portfolio_truth_states.VERIFIED: fresh audited PAPER ledger display truth
portfolio_truth_states.STALE: last verified audited PAPER ledger display truth that requires PAPER rerun
portfolio_truth_states.UNVERIFIED: missing, invalid, or unbound current evidence

stale_current_evidence_display: cash, equity, PnL, return, and positions remain visible with STALE freshness
configured_paper_capital_display: configured PAPER baseline remains PASS when source is bound
